{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240147175220C76F491F8B559FEC"}"},"total":1781},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7446765223572243224","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"也是看了很久，小说大框架感觉完整了，前期很多伏笔也有体现了，当游戏融入现实，就是这部作品爽文的开始，但爽文不是无脑爽，要有逻辑，这也是写爽文的难度之一，也有小问题，就是。。。。。可以多来点图，感觉现在人物活了但是没有画面感，有些情节配上图更生动（之前德柱悍匪仙女棒图好评，就是太少了）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733838163,"group_id":"7310014969041390592","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3804771700987239"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7310014969041390592","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"135"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":48935,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":25},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7379219059565462296","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"首先创新有的，对于爽文的题材来看是非常贴合的，并且文章中穿插爱情线，友情线，情节挺丰富的。对于人物描写是好的，读进去后人物形象饱满，特点鲜明，主要还有虐日虐西巴的文，民族情结拉满。
要说不足的也有，虽然是爽文，但是并不代表主人公没有挫折，一帆风顺反到索然无味，有些时候可以用挫折去塑造人物，让人物的成功来的有一小点难度，这样会更爽，其实大局观，包括主人公的压力都可以是挫折，毕竟能力越大责任越大
感觉现在的文章还处于前期没到真正爽的时候，毕竟主人公还没成长起来，期待那一天"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718111022,"group_id":"7310014969041390592","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"懒，不想介绍","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2fg9aTqCyqtkayG4ekUwT5plUpxsydTJlUBN7OarYeG","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f807223c7470421e89611f8ace196e4e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881870&x-signature=W3%2FKaxdaujQ0TI6LKGrbC57BRMc%3D","user_id":"3804771700987239","user_name":"狞笑MC"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3804771700987239","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7310014969041390592","book_info":{"abstract":"【爽文中的爽文！】
【越看越上头，看到后面都说好！】
苏念死后，居然回到了虚拟网游《神域》的开服当天？
既然遗憾还有挽回的机会，
他走上了与前世截然不同的道路！
利用惊天BUG！
开局觉醒超神级天赋——百分比斩杀！
什么？你说这个天赋弱？
可倘若它能无限升级进化！
直至……百分百概率斩杀敌人呢？
